mapper.sql: l.apply_id, l.apply_no, l.reg_id, l.patient_id, l.doctor_id, l.item_id, l.clinical_info, l.status, l.lab_doctor_id, l.lab_result, l.lab_value, l.lab_time, l.create_time, l.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, li.item_name, li.item_code, li.item_price, lu.real_name AS lab_doctor_name FROM lab_apply l LEFT JOIN patient p ON l.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON l.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN lab_item li ON l.item_id = li.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user lu ON l.lab_doctor_id = lu.user_id WHERE l.apply_id = #{applyId}

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, li.item_name, li.item_code, li.item_price, lu.real_name AS lab_doctor_name FROM lab_apply l LEFT JOIN patient p ON l.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON l.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN lab_item li ON l.item_id = li.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user lu ON l.lab_doctor_id = lu.user_id WHERE l.reg_id = #{regId} ORDER BY l.apply_id

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, li.item_name, li.item_code, li.item_price, lu.real_name AS lab_doctor_name FROM lab_apply l LEFT JOIN patient p ON l.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON l.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN lab_item li ON l.item_id = li.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user lu ON l.lab_doctor_id = lu.user_id WHERE l.patient_id = #{patientId} AND l.status = #{status} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lab_apply (apply_no, reg_id, patient_id, doctor_id, item_id, clinical_info, status) VALUES (#{applyNo}, #{regId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{itemId}, #{clinicalInfo}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE lab_apply SET status = #{status} WHERE apply_id = #{applyId}
